articles.description: Google wants its AI to see all the photos of "you and your loved ones." Billions of users must now decide.
articles.content:
All your photos are now in play.
getty
Take a moment to think before you dive in. Thats the best advice for Google Photos users, as the company confirms its latest update can scan all your photos t… [+2859 chars]
